params.name: Nuclear Bomb
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.07%)
params.description:
On Jul 16, 1945 AD, the very first nuclear bomb exploded.

A nuclear bomb derives its power from the nuclear fission of uranium. Its purpose is to cause large-sale radioactive contamination and devastation via photothermal radiation, shockwave, and induced radioactivity. Not only is the energy released massive, but the nuclear reaction only takes microseconds to release energy.

[Basic info]

Length: 2.5 meters

Diameter: 0.61 meters

Weight: 3900 kg

Yield: 15000 tons
